name: fix-webdav-worktree-sync-conflicts
title: Fix WebDAV worktree sync conflicts
description: Fix WebDAV sync missing worktree records and stale conflict resolution state.
creator: codex
notes: Verified with npx tsc --noEmit, cargo check, targeted Rust tests, git diff --check, and gitnexus detect-changes. GitNexus detect-changes reports critical scope because sync, migration, sidebar, and terminal flows are all affected.
